title: Midnight Crisp Tunisian Steak Skewers
description: Resinous and crisp Tunisian steak skewers perfect for a midnight craving, featuring skirt steak and an ice bath shock, kosher friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Add the skirt steak pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium high heat.
Thread the marinated steak pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until the steak is cooked to desired doneness.
Immediately after grilling, submerge the skewers in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Let the skewers sit in the ice bath for 5 minutes before removing and serving.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
